name: Relative Humidity (%)
description: The sensed relative humidity in percent, evaluated air quality, and sensor state. The idle update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B27, and can be changed with 0x5B28.
comment: Relative Humidity (%): Humidity percentage sensor.

name: VOC Index Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed VOC index ERD, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B2C.
comment: VOC Index Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested VOC Index Sensor Update Idle Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed VOC index ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested VOC Index Sensor Update Idle Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of VOC Index
description:
Used to request an update to the device VOC index ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B2E will be updated
comment: Request Update of VOC Index: Single numeric writable value.

name: VOC Index
description: The sensed Volatile Organic Compounds Index from 1 to 500, evaluated air quality, and sensor state. A value of 100 represents the average VOC presence in the last 24 hrs. Value > 100 represents VOCs are more intense than usual. If value remains elevated for 3 hours, then the sensor will adapt the VOC levels to be part of the background VOC. The idle update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B2B, and can be changed with 0x5B2C.
comment: VOC Index: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: PM 2.5 Update Idle Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed PM 2.5 ERD, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B30.
comment: PM 2.5 Update Idle Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 2.5 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed PM 2.5 ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 2.5 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 2.5 (ug/m^3)
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 2.5 ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B32 will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 2.5 (ug/m^3): Single numeric writable value.

name: PM 2.5 (ug/m^3)
description: The sensed PM 2.5 in ug/m^3, evaluated air quality and sensor state. The idle update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B2F, and can be changed with 0x5B30.
comment: PM 2.5 (ug/m^3): Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: NOx Index Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed NOx ERD, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B34.
comment: NOx Index Idle Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested NOx Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed NOx ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested NOx Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of NOx Index
description:
Used to request an update to the device NOx index ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B36 will be updated
comment: Request Update of NOx Index: Single numeric writable value.

name: NOx Index
description: The sensed Nitrous Oxide index from 1 to 500, evaluated air quality, and sensor state. A value of 1 represents the average NOx presence in the last 24 hrs. Values > 1 represents NOx presences. If value remains elevated for 3 hours, then the sensor will adapt the VOC levels to be part of the background VOC. The update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B33, and can be changed with 0x5B34.
comment: NOx Index: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: PM 1 Update Idle Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed PM 1 ERD, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B38.
comment: PM 1 Update Idle Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 1 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed PM 1 ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 1 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 1 (ug/m^3)
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 1 ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B3A will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 1 (ug/m^3): Single numeric writable value.

name: PM 1 (ug/m^3)
description: The sensed PM 1 in ug/m^3, evaluated air quality and sensor state. The idle update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B37, and can be changed with 0x5B38.
comment: PM 1 (ug/m^3): Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: PM 4 Update Idle Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed PM 4 ERD, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B3C.
comment: PM 4 Update Idle Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 4 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed PM 4 ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 4 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 4 (ug/m^3)
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 4 ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B3F will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 4 (ug/m^3): Single numeric writable value.

name: Hood Notifications V2
description: List of version 2 hood notifications.
comment: Hood Notifications V2: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: PM 4 (ug/m^3)
description: The sensed PM 4 in ug/m^3, evaluated air quality, and sensor state. The idle update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B3B, and can be changed with 0x5B3C.
comment: PM 4 (ug/m^3): Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: PM 10 Update Idle Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed PM 10 ERD, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B41.
comment: PM 10 Update Idle Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 10 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed PM 10 ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 10 Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 10 (ug/m^3)
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 10 ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B43 will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 10 (ug/m^3): Single numeric writable value.

name: PM 10 (ug/m^3)
description: The sensed PM 10 in ug/m^3, the evaluated air quality, and sensor state. The idle update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B40, and can be changed with 0x5B41.
comment: PM 10 (ug/m^3): Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Environmental Temperature Update Idle Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed Environmental Temperature, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B45.
comment: Environmental Temperature Update Idle Period in Minutes: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Requested Environmental Temperature Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed Environmental Temperature ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested Environmental Temperature Idle Update Period in Minutes: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Request Update of Environmental Temperature (F)
description:
Used to request an update to the device Environmental temperature ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B47 will be updated
comment: Request Update of Environmental Temperature (F): Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Environmental Temperature
description: The sensed Environmental Temperature in Fahrenheit, evaluated air quality, and sensor state. The idle update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B44, and can be changed with 0x5B45.
comment: Environmental Temperature: Temperature in Fahrenheit.

name: Supported Hood Notifications V2
description: List of supported notifications from a hood.
comment: Supported Hood Notifications V2: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Air Filter Fan Run Time
description: The total run time of the hood air filter fan in minutes. This value can be reset using 0x5B0D.
comment: Air Filter Fan Run Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Charcoal Filter Fan Run Time
description: The total run time of the hood charcoal filter fan in minutes. This value can be reset using 0x5B0D.
comment: Charcoal Filter Fan Run Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Overall Air Quality
description: The device overall resolved air quality. This ERD will not change more than once per minute.
comment: Overall Air Quality: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Available Color Schemes
description: The available color schemes on the device.
comment: Available Color Schemes: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Selected Color Scheme
description: The current color scheme used by the device.
comment: Selected Color Scheme: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Requested Color Scheme
description: Initiates a request to change to the desired color scheme. This changes the value in 0x5B4D. The device should support the requested scheme from 0x5B4C.
comment: Requested Color Scheme: Enum writable select.

name: PM 2.5 Index Update Period in Minutes
description:
The PM 2.5 Index ERD is expected to report at least once during this period.
The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B50.
comment: PM 2.5 Index Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 2.5 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes
description:
The requested change to the update period of the sensed PM 2.5 Index ERD.
The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 2.5 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 2.5 Index
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 2.5 Index ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B52 will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 2.5 Index: Single numeric writable value.

name: PM 2.5 Index
description:
The sensed PM 2.5 as a relative value, the evaluated air quality, and sensor state.
The relative value is defined as 0-100, where 0 means no or minimal presence and 100 means maximum presence.
The maximum update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B4F, and can be changed with 0x5B50.
comment: PM 2.5 Index: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: PM 1 Index Update Period in Minutes
description:
The PM 1 Index ERD is expected to report at least once during this period.
The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B54.
comment: PM 1 Index Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 1 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes
description:
The requested change to the update period of the sensed PM 1 Index ERD.
The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 1 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 1 Index
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 1 Index ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B56 will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 1 Index: Single numeric writable value.

name: PM 1 Index
description:
The sensed PM 1 as a relative value, the evaluated air quality, and sensor state.
The relative value is defined as 0-100, where 0 means no or minimal presence and 100 means maximum presence.
The maximum update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B53, and can be changed with 0x5B54.
comment: PM 1 Index: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: PM 4 Index Update Period in Minutes
description:
The PM 4 Index ERD is expected to report at least once during this period.
The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B58.
comment: PM 4 Index Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 4 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes
description:
The requested change to the update period of the sensed PM 4 Index ERD.
The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 4 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 4 Index
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 4 Index ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B5A will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 4 Index: Single numeric writable value.

name: PM 4 Index
description:
The sensed PM 4 as a relative value, the evaluated air quality, and sensor state.
The relative value is defined as 0-100, where 0 means no or minimal presence and 100 means maximum presence.
The maximum update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B57, and can be changed with 0x5B58.
comment: PM 4 Index: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: PM 10 Index Update Period in Minutes
description:
The PM 10 Index ERD is expected to report at least once during this period.
The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B5C.
comment: PM 10 Index Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Requested PM 10 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes
description:
The requested change to the update period of the sensed PM 10 Index ERD.
The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested PM 10 Index Sensor Update Period in Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Request Update of PM 10 Index
description:
Used to request an update to the device PM 10 Index ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B5E will be updated
comment: Request Update of PM 10 Index: Single numeric writable value.

name: PM 10 Index
description:
The sensed PM 10 as a relative value, the evaluated air quality, and sensor state.
The relative value is defined as 0-100, where 0 means no or minimal presence and 100 means maximum presence.
The maximum update period for this ERD is reported in 0x5B5B, and can be changed with 0x5B5C.
comment: PM 10 Index: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Timed Mode Current Setting
description: ERD must specify the time (in minutes and seconds) and power level (1-10) of the operation.  If the unit is also to start, ERD 0x5C11 must be set subsequent to this one.  The microwave is responsible to clear any previously set modes when it receives this mode.  If this mode is not set than time should be set to 00 minutes 00 seconds and power level should be 0.  The time, is the time at start.  It should not change once the mode is started.  All active cook time notifications should come from 0x5C15.
comment: Microwave Timed Mode Current Setting: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Available Microwave Modes
description: List of available modes on the microwave.
comment: Available Microwave Modes: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Popcorn Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Popcorn Mode. All values are in ounce (oz).
comment: Microwave Popcorn Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Popcorn Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Popcorn mode measured in ounces (oz).
comment: Microwave Popcorn Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Potato Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Potato Mode (count/each). If bit is set it will indicate that the sub menu is available. Otherwise, bit should be 0. Ex, if "1 potato" bit is set then the potato mode supports 1 potato in the potato sub menu.
comment: Microwave Potato Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Potato Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Potato.
comment: Microwave Potato Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Beverage Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Beverage Mode (Units in cups). If bit is set it will indicate that the sub menu is available. Otherwise, bit should be 0. Ex. if bit 2 and 3 are set, the Beverage Mode supports 1 cup and 2 cups as sub menu settings.
comment: Microwave Beverage Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Beverage Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Beverage mode. Units are in cups.
comment: Microwave Beverage Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Pizza Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Pizza Mode (Units in slices).If bit is set it will indicate that the sub menu is available. Otherwise, bit should be 0. Ex. if bit 2 and 3 are set, the Pizza Mode supports 1 slice and 3 slices as in the sub menu.
comment: Microwave Pizza Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Pizza Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Pizza mode. Measured in slices.
comment: Microwave Pizza Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Frozen Vegetable Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Frozen Vegetable Mode. Units in cups.
comment: Microwave Frozen Vegetable Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Frozen Vegetable Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Frozen Vegetable mode. Measured in cups.
comment: Microwave Frozen Vegetable Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Fresh Vegetable Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Fresh/Canned Vegetable Mode. Units in cups.
comment: Microwave Fresh Vegetable Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Fresh Vegetable Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Fresh/Canned Vegetable mode. Measured in cups.
comment: Microwave Fresh Vegetable Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Reheat Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Reheat Mode.
comment: Microwave Reheat Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Reheat Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Reheat mode.
comment: Microwave Reheat Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Add 30 Second Command
description: Allows to send a command to microwave to add 30 seconds. The sequence number is a randomly generated number that is sent with each Write.
comment: Microwave Add 30 Second Command: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave State
description: Current Microwave state.  If microwave state is set to "On" or "Paused" the microwave should ignore any requests to change the cycle.  Since the door state cannot be set from the cloud, FF should be placed into the door state whenever written from the cloud/app to the microwave to indicate that the state cannot be changed.  Only 1 mode is ever allowed to be set on the microwave.  If subsequent mode commands (such as 0x5c03 followed by 0x5c05) are sent, the microwave is responsible to make sure that only the latest received mode command is recognized and reported as active.
comment: Microwave State: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Power in Watts
description: Current microwave power level in watts
comment: Microwave Power in Watts: Power measurement sensor.

name: Microwave Time after Cycle End
description: The time in minutes after cooking cycle ends and before the door has been opened. Timer resets when door is opened.
comment: Microwave Time after Cycle End: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Microwave Remote Enable
description: Microwave Remote Enable.
comment: Microwave Remote Enable: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Microwave Cook Timer
description: The number of minutes and seconds remaining for the cook timer.  This should be the only cook timer that decrements once a cooking/defrost/popcorn/... cycle begins.  All other microwave cook mode times (such as those in 0x5c00 and 0x5C17) are only initial cook times, not current cook time.
comment: Microwave Cook Timer: Timer/duration value.

name: Microwave Defrost by Weight - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Defrost by Weight mode. Weight is multiplied by 10 to ensure value is integer
comment: Microwave Defrost by Weight - Current Setting: Single numeric writable value.

name: Microwave Defrost by Time Mode - Current Setting
description: Defrost by Time mode is set in minutes and seconds. ERD must specify the time (in minutes and seconds) and power level (1-10) of the operation.  If the unit is also to start, ERD 0x5C11 must be set subsequent to this one.  The microwave is responsible to clear any previously set modes when it receives this mode.  If this mode is not set than time should be set to 00 minutes 00 seconds and power level should be 0.  The time, is the time at start.  It should not change once the mode is started.  All active cook time notifications should come from 0x5C15.
comment: Microwave Defrost by Time Mode - Current Setting: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Notifications
description: Current Notifications from Microwave. If the bit is set, the notification is active on the unit.

data.name: Check for doneness & add toppings Notification
Check for doneness. Turn food over before resuming. Notification
Stir food & check for doneness Notification

comment: Microwave Notifications: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Kitchen/Display Timer
description: The number of minutes and seconds remaining for the timer on the user interface.  Once the timer has went to 0 min 0 sec, "timer expired" should be set, by setting Expiry notification for Microwave Kitchen Timer in ERD 0x5020 .
comment: Microwave Kitchen/Display Timer: Timer/duration value.

name: Microwave Cycle Setting Modification Availability
description: If the bit is 1, the particular setting can be changed. Unit must set the bit to 0 if the particular setting can no longer be modified during a cycle.
comment: Microwave Cycle Setting Modification Availability: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Cook Timer Modification
description: Send an arbitrary cook time to be added or subtracted from the current cook time. Sequence Number is a random number generated by the client and allows microwave to detect that a new request is sent.
comment: Microwave Cook Timer Modification: Timer/duration value.

name: Microwave Dinner Plate Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available settings for Dinner Plate Mode.
comment: Microwave Dinner Plate Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Dinner Plate Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for the MWO dinner plate Mode.  If not set, it should read FF.
comment: Microwave Dinner Plate Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Kitchen Timer Modification
description: Send an arbitrary Kitchen Timer time to be added or subtracted from the current Kitchen timer. Sequence Number is a random number generated by the client and allows microwave to detect that a new request is sent.

data.name: Add or Subtract Kitchen Timer Time

comment: Microwave Kitchen Timer Modification: Timer/duration value.

name: Microwave Defrost by Weight - Maximum Allowed Setting
description: Maximum weight allowed for Defrost by Weight mode. Weight is multiplied by 10 to ensure value is integer.
comment: Microwave Defrost by Weight - Maximum Allowed Setting: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Microwave Warm Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available settings for MWO Warm Mode.
comment: Microwave Warm Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Warm Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for the MWO warm feature.  If not set, it should read FF.
comment: Microwave Warm Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Auto Defrost Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available settings for Auto Defrost.  The max weight setting for all items is set by ERD 0x5C20.
comment: Microwave Auto Defrost Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Auto Defrost Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for the MWO Auto defrost Mode.  If not set, it should read FF.
comment: Microwave Auto Defrost Mode - Current Setting: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Broil Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available settings for Broil Mode.
comment: Microwave Broil Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Broil Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for the MWO broil feature.  If not set, it should read FF.
comment: Microwave Broil Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Microwave Auto Bake - Available Settings
description: Defines the min and max range for each of the available food types.
comment: Microwave Auto Bake - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Auto Bake Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for the MWO auto bake feature.  If not set, it should read FF.
comment: Microwave Auto Bake Mode - Current Setting: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Auto Roast - Available Settings
description: The min and max weights available for each of the proteins in lbsx10.  00 in both min/max bytes means mode not supported by microwave.
comment: Microwave Auto Roast - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Auto Roast Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for the MWO auto roast feature.  If not set, it should read FF.
comment: Microwave Auto Roast Mode - Current Setting: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Oven Cook Timer
description: Cook timer associated with oven based cook modes on convection microwaves
comment: Microwave Oven Cook Timer: Timer/duration value.

name: Microwave Protein Mode - Available Settings
description: Details which proteins are supported and the associated minimum and maximum weights that are supported by the mode.
comment: Microwave Protein Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Oven Temperature Range
description: Minimum and maximum temperature ranges for all oven based modes that are set by temperature.
comment: Microwave Oven Temperature Range: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Microwave Protein Mode - Current Setting
description:
Current setting for Protein mode.
Must set the type of protein and the weight of that item in lbs x 10.
A value of 0x0 for the weight is considered a sensor cook for that protein type.
comment: Microwave Protein Mode - Current Setting: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Broil With Time Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available settings for Broil With Time Mode.  Broil with Time Mode requires a cook timer (0x5C2B) to also be set in conjunction with Broil with Time mode.
comment: Microwave Broil With Time Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.
